examples: He is resigned to the noise, the mess, the constant upheaval.
Whilst chaos and upheaval reigns in the college, what of the chaos and noise that local residents are subjected to ?
I can't face the upheaval of moving house again.
In the face of this much upheaval, only one thing could be riskier: standing still.
Schaufuss said the rest of the company was in "good spirits" despite the cast upheaval.
